{{Infobox group
| name = the Perfected
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Perfected]] are aware of Shyrax's activities.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Perfected]] are contenders for the throne of [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Perfected]] are a group whose actions can be attributed to the [[Zenith Devices]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
